scripts.update: npm run update:local && npm run rebuild:slices
scripts.chat:open:
powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$p = node -e "require('fs').existsSync('docs\chat')||require('fs').mkdirSync('docs\chat',{recursive:true}); const d=new Date(); const f=`docs\\chat\\${d.getFullYear()}-${String(d.getMonth()+1).padStart(2,'0')}-${String(d.getDate()).padStart(2,'0')}.md`; if(!require('fs').existsSync(f)){require('fs').writeFileSync(f, '# Chat log ' + f.split('\\').pop().replace('.md','') + '

- Started: ' + new Date().toISOString() + '

## Notes

');} console.log(f);"; code $p"
scripts.dev:lowmem: cross-env LOWMEM=1 NEXT_TELEMETRY_DISABLED=1 STRICT_PORT=1 NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=896 DISABLE_V8_COMPACTING_GC=1 SQLITE_LOW_MEM=1 SQLITE_CACHE_KB=6000 npm run -s dev
scripts.build:lowmem: cross-env LOWMEM=1 NEXT_TELEMETRY_DISABLED=1 NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=896 SQLITE_LOW_MEM=1 SQLITE_CACHE_KB=6000 npm run -s build
scripts.local:refresh:actives: npm run -s local:seed:actives && npm run -s local:fetch:active && npm run -s local:build:summary
scripts.local:bootstrap:sample: npm run local:seed:players && cross-env PLAYER=1631094 PLAYER_NAME="Paolo Banchero" npm run local:fetch && npm run local:build:summary && npm run local:query:examples
scripts.local:fetch:named+summary: npm run local:fetch:named && npm run local:build:summary
scripts.local:refresh: npm run local:seed:players && npm run local:fetch:active && npm run local:build:summary
scripts.local:fetch:ids+summary: npm run -s local:fetch:ids && npm run -s local:build:summary
scripts.ci:guards: node -e "const fs=require('fs'),p='src/pages';if(fs.existsSync(p)){const e=fs.readdirSync(p).filter(n=>!n.startsWith('.'));if(e.length){console.error('CI guard: remove legacy Pages Router files under src/pages:', e.join(', '));process.exit(2);}}"
scripts.ci: npm run -s ci:guards && npm run -s typecheck && npm run -s lint && npm run -s build
scripts.report:missing:all: cross-env WRITE_REPORT=1 OUT_FORMATS=json,md OUT_BASENAME=missing-seasons MIN_PTS=0 IGNORE_FUTURE=1 tsx scripts/detect_missing_seasons.ts
scripts.report:missing:all:fast: cross-env WRITE_REPORT=1 APPEND_PROGRESS=1 CONCURRENCY=10 SLEEP_BETWEEN_MS=75 OUT_FORMATS=json,md OUT_BASENAME=missing-seasons MIN_PTS=0 IGNORE_FUTURE=1 tsx scripts/detect_missing_seasons.ts
scripts.report:missing:all:onecall: cross-env WRITE_REPORT=1 APPEND_PROGRESS=1 USE_COMMONALLPLAYERS=1 ALLPLAYERS_SEASON=2024-25 CONCURRENCY=10 SLEEP_BETWEEN_MS=25 OUT_FORMATS=json,md OUT_BASENAME=missing-seasons MIN_PTS=0 IGNORE_FUTURE=1 tsx scripts/detect_missing_seasons.ts
scripts.report:missing:offline: cross-env WRITE_REPORT=1 OUT_FORMATS=json,md OUT_BASENAME=missing-seasons-offline MIN_PTS=0 tsx scripts/detect_missing_seasons_offline.ts
scripts.report:missing:offline:shaq: cross-env ONLY_IDS=406 WRITE_REPORT=1 OUT_BASENAME=missing-seasons-offline-shaq OUT_FORMATS=json,md tsx scripts/detect_missing_seasons_offline.ts
scripts.backfill:offline+summary: npm run -s backfill:offline && npm run -s local:build:summary
scripts.backfill:offline:shaq+summary: npm run -s backfill:offline:shaq && npm run -s local:build:summary
scripts.report:missing:shaq: cross-env WRITE_REPORT=1 OUT_FORMATS=json,md OUT_BASENAME=missing-seasons-shaq ONLY_IDS=406 IGNORE_FUTURE=1 tsx scripts/detect_missing_seasons.ts
scripts.py:backfill:shaq+summary: npm run -s py:backfill:shaq && npm run -s local:build:summary
scripts.py:backfill:nba_api+summary: npm run -s py:backfill:nba_api && npm run -s local:build:summary
scripts.report:missing:1999-00: cross-env TARGET_SEASON=1999-00 WRITE_REPORT=1 OUT_FORMATS=csv,md tsx scripts/report_missing_seasons_1999_00.ts
